creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
The following configuration works fine for:
/var/tmp/gitlab_runner/.gitlab-runner/config:
concurrent = 1
check_interval = 0

[session_server]
  session_timeout = 1800

[[runners]]
  name = "x.x.x"
  url = "https://gitlab.fechner.net/"
  token = "xxx"
  executor = "shell"
  [runners.custom_build_dir]
  [runners.cache]
    [runners.cache.s3]
    [runners.cache.gcs]
    [runners.cache.azure]
